title: AXRailClickEvent
description: Event emitted when a rail navigation item is clicked.

types.title: AXRailClickEvent
types.description: Event data for rail navigation item clicks.

props.name: component
props.description: The rail navigation item component that was clicked.

props.name: htmlElement
props.description: The HTML element of the clicked item.

props.name: nativeEvent
props.description: The native mouse event that triggered the click.
